title: Security Support Provider DLL Persistence
description: Detects registration of Security Support Provider DLLs for credential interception.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*Security Packages*' and 'Command Line' like '*reg*' and 'Command Line' like '*add*')))

tests.test_name: Modify HKLM:\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa Security Support Provider configuration in registry
Modify HKLM:\System\CurrentControlSet\Control\Lsa\OSConfig Security Support Provider configuration in registry
